channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android Beta
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Share your Scribes across multiple teams

Scribe

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Share your Scribes across multiple teams
item.description:
Scribe

Loading...

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded language support for building and editing spreadsheets with Gemini
item.description:
Google Workspace

Earlier this year, we introduced new Gemini in Sheets capabilities that allow you to build and edit entire spreadsheets using simple natural language. We’re now expanding support for these features to 28 additional languages, enabling users who speak Spanish, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Italian,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Meet now available on Android Auto
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re bringing the power of Google Meet to your vehicle's display with our new integration for Android Auto. This update makes it easy to safely stay connected and handle important meetings hands-free from behind the wheel.Users can now access Google Meet directly from their car's dashboard. This...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improved management of secondary calendars via the Calendar API
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing two enhancements to the Calendar API that make it easier for admins to programmatically manage secondary calendars within their organization: a transfer API and a filter for secondary calendars owned by your organization.Transfer APIAs previously announced, the new endpoint in the...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value is create_from_brand_template, which is the existing functionality for creating new designs from a brand template. For backwards compatibility,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Make Gemini more helpful and relevant to your teaching goals with the Google Classroom app in Gemini
item.description:
Google Workspace

Educators have shared that AI is especially helpful when it understands the context of their teaching environment, from tailoring resources toward student needs or building on their existing materials. To support this, Gemini will be able to collaborate with your Google Classroom, using context...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Announcing the Slackbot MCP Client
item.description:
Slack

We're excited to introduce you to the Slackbot MCP Client, which gives you the ability to superpower Slackbot with your desired tools.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New response and request fields added to the following APIs : Order, Billing, Quotes, Subscription
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New response and request fields added to the following APIs : Order, Billing, Quotes, and Subscription.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 7.0.5
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Add new video and control functions, and meeting evnts notification; change the return type for joinMeeting and startMeeting.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Custom event colors in Google Calendar
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Calendar is expanding its event coloring options, moving beyond the current limitation of 11 predefined colors for events. Going forward, users are offered an expanded color palette so they can personalize events and visually organize their calendar with ease, giving each user access to up...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Enhanced AI avatar features and capabilities in Google Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

With the integration of Gemini 3.1 Flash Text-To-Speech (TTS) and the latest capabilities in Veo 3.1, AI avatars in Google Vids have become more realistic and expressive than ever. We’re excited to announce expanded language support, a new collection of avatar defaults, and the ability to direct...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Create longer Veo videos and generate multiple at once in Google Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Starting today, we’re introducing powerful new ways to create and iterate on video content in Google Vids using Veo. These updates provide all Vids users with the ability to create longer videos with consistent characters and generate multiple videos in parallel, enabling you to bring your vision...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - System notifications now delivered by "Slack" instead of Slackbot
item.description:
Slack

Slack system notifications (such as channel membership changes, User Group updates, Slack Connect alerts, and retention policy notices) are now delivered from the "Slack" system user (USLACK) instead of Slackbot.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Control whether your users can have temporary chats and delete conversations in the Gemini app
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing two new administrator controls for the Gemini app (gemini.google.com) that allow end users to manage their own chat activity. Admins can now configure whether users can use temporary chats and delete their conversation history.Temporary chats allows users to have conversations...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Reorder Table and Repeater Rows with Drag and Drop
item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to introduce a new way to manage data in Table and Repeater gadgets. Users can now reorder rows using drag-and-drop functional...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Gemini in Chrome expands to more languages and regions, including Latin America, Africa, and the Middle East
item.description:
Google Workspace

Many of Chrome's latest AI features are rolling out to users in Latin America, Africa, the Middle East, and more. Gemini in Chrome empowers business and education users with AI tools that integrate seamlessly into their daily browsing workflows while maintaining strict data governance. It’s also...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - AI note-taking is now available in Google Voice
item.description:
Google Workspace

“Take notes for me” is available in Google Voice for your phone calls. This powerful new feature records and transcribes calls, summarizes key points, and organizes action items, which are sent via Gmail and stored in the Voice app. This built-in tool eliminates manual note-taking, ensures critical...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New discoverable space setting in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Chat is expanding how users can find and join spaces by adding a third access option called "Discoverable."Previously, spaces were either private (invite-only) or open (anyone in the organization can find and join). Discoverable spaces provide a new option between the two: they appear when...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The preview Get design pages API now returns an id for each page, which can be used to correlate pages with per-page data from other APIs.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - Design responses now include a design_types field, and DesignPage responses now include a design_type field. These indicate the type of content a desi
item.description:
Canva

Design responses now include a design_types field, and DesignPage responses now include a design_type field. These indicate the type of content a design or page contains, such as doc or presentation. The value unknown is returned when the type cannot be determined. This list may be extended in the...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New Block Kit data visualization block
item.description:
Slack

The data visualization block is now available for use with Block Kit.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Versions and Document Edit History Are Now Available to All Customers
item.description:
Kuali Build

We're excited to announce that Document Versions and Document Edit History are now available to all Kuali customers. Previously, these featu...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.6 beta 2 (25G5043d)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Batch Actions from Document Lists
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now take action on multiple documents at once directly from a Document List. Managing documents one at a time can be time-consuming,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Carrier Link for Google Voice
item.description:
Google Workspace

Carrier Link allows Workspace customers to easily add phone numbers and calling plans from a certified local carrier, leveraging a pre-configured multi-tenant implementation of SIP Link.This simplifies the process of setting up a cloud phone system, allowing customers to make and receive calls with...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New Doc Content APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | Added new Doc Content APIs.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - June 12, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Request lightweight document alignment with approvals in Google DriveGoogle Drive is introducing alignment approvals, a lightweight mechanism that allows teams to request and record document sign-offs without file changes resetting the approval flow. When a document is in a partially approved...

View release notes →

Scribe
View release notes →

Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have a number of releases today with new builds across Beta, Experimental and Release Preview. Release notes for inbox Windows 11 apps Windows 11 inbox apps are now getting their own release notes sectio The post Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026 appeared first on...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - June 12, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts data values for sheet data fields, which lets you autofill tabular data for sheet elements. Sheet data fields are currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Vault now supports retention rules and litigation holds for Gemini app
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Vault now supports retention rules and litigation holds for the Gemini app on web and mobile. Previously, administrators were able to use Vault to search Gemini app conversations and export those search results. With this update, administrators can now also create, update, and delete the...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Added five new response fields to GET and PATCH userID User APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added five new response fields (workforceManagementRole, zoomAIProductivitySuiteSubscription, zoomAIProductivitySuite, qualityManagementRole, zoomRevenueAcceleratorRole) to the GET and PATCH /v2/scim2/Users/{userId} endpoints.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New venue response field added to Events API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new endpoint for Events API.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Meet now supports sending 1080p HD video from ChromeOS meeting room hardware
item.description:
Google Workspace

We previously launched support for sending full HD video (1080p) in Meet on the web, and we’re now extending that capability to Google Meet room hardware based on ChromeOS.Google Meet will use full HD when the additional bandwidth is needed for sharp video from the room, such as:On large screens:...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The List folder items API now supports brand_template as an item type. Brand templates in folders are returned in the response and can be filtered usi
item.description:
Canva

The List folder items API now supports brand_template as an item type. Brand templates in folders are returned in the response and can be filtered using the item_types parameter.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Get design export formats API now returns page-level format options. Each format includes the page_numbers that support it. If a format is support
item.description:
Canva

The Get design export formats API now returns page-level format options. Each format includes the page_numbers that support it. If a format is supported by every page in the design, its page_numbers are omitted.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Publish brand template API is now available as a preview. It publishes a design as a brand template, creating a new brand template or updating an
item.description:
Canva

The Publish brand template API is now available as a preview. It publishes a design as a brand template, creating a new brand template or updating an existing one if the design is a draft of an existing template.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Introducing the Workspace Policy API mutate endpoints for DLP
item.description:
Google Workspace

The Workspace Policy API provides a centralized, comprehensive view of your security settings, eliminating the need to navigate to numerous pages in the Admin console.With our latest update, we are introducing mutate endpoints (Create, Update, Delete) alongside existing read-only capabilities (Get,...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 27 beta (26A5353q)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Convert rubric files and images into Google Classroom rubrics with help from Gemini
item.description:
Google Workspace

Building on our October launch, Gemini in Google Classroom can now help educators more easily convert rubric files and images into Google Classroom rubrics, right within the assignment creation workflow. Educators can now upload more file types, such as .jpeg and .png files. For example, by...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Request lightweight document alignment with approvals in Google Drive
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Drive is introducing alignment approvals, a lightweight mechanism that allows teams to request and record document sign-offs without file changes resetting the approval flow. When a document is in a partially approved state, collaborators can continue making edits without resetting any...

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new endpoints for Archiving APIs.

View release notes →

Zoom

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Three new response fields in the historical flow performance API.

View release notes →

Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, This week we continue to expand the rollout of the new Windows Insider Program changes to devices in channels already announced. New builds this week Today we are releasing new Windows 11 Insider Preview B The post Announcing new builds for 29 May 2026 appeared first on...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The preview Get design pages API now returns a page_number property on each page, which is a replacement for the now-deprecated index property. The tw
item.description:
Canva

The preview Get design pages API now returns a page_number property on each page, which is a replacement for the now-deprecated index property. The two properties always return the same value. The index property will be removed in a future release after existing integrations have migrated; new...

View release notes →

item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

Kuali Build

You can now create and run Secondary Workflows to support processes that happen outside your main submission workflow. This gives you more f...

Windows

[19 May 2026: Updated build numbers for new releases containing bug fixes - see release notes for details] Hello Windows Insiders, Today we're releasing new builds for Release Preview across our supported versions of Windows 11. Please see the bu The post Announcing new Release Preview builds for...

item.title: Kuali Build - Default View Settings Have Moved to Views
item.description:
Kuali Build

Default View Settings are now managed directly in Views, making it easier to control what users see by default. Previously, admins configure...

item.title: Kuali Build - Interactive Design Lab Improvements Release
item.description:
Kuali Build

We’re excited to share a new set of improvements inspired by our first-ever Interactive Design Lab at Kuali Days 2026. This session brought ...

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.04
item.description:
ClickUp

Gantt Baselines, Brain goes Mobile, ClickUp in ChatGPT, and More!This week's ClickUpdates brings Gantt Baselines to track how your project plans shift over time, the full power of Brain to your mobile device, ClickUp right inside ChatGPT, and more ways to customize how your meetings are captured.✨...

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 25.0.11
item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.03
item.description:
ClickUp

Google Drive Automations, Granular Capacity in Workload View, and Smoother Teammate Onboarding!This week's release automates work between ClickUp and Google Drive, provides more detail into team capacity in Workload view, and lets you onboard invitees to teams faster.✨ Automate Workflows between...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

View release notes →

item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Weekly Recap - 02.13.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

item.title: ClickUp - Super Agents: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Super Agents: The world's first human-like AI AgentsSuper Agents™ are personalized AI teammates that understand your work, use powerful tools, and collaborate like humans. Just describe the problem you want solved, the workflow you want to automate, or where you’re wasting time, and Super Agents...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - ⚡ Join us for a Super Agents AMA on Reddit!
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!We’re excited to announce a special Reddit AMA (Ask Me Anything) with the ClickUp AI Team, all about our latest feature: Super Agents!🗓️ When: Thursday, January 22nd, 10am–12pm PST📍 Where: the r/ClickUp subreddit on RedditThis is your opportunity to connect directly with Michael Van...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Product Recap - 01.12.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed an issue where YouTube element showed an error due to recent changes in YouTube's Terms of Service. - Resolved a styling inheritance issue in Korbyt Create AI Layouts where elements did not...

View release notes →

Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Added audio volume control for media in Korbyt Anywhere PWA, requested specifically to be used for Microsoft Teams Rooms use cases 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed display issues in the NWS Weather Element...
